drills.name: Passing Gates
drills.description: Pairs pass through a two-cone gate five yards apart, one touch to receive, one to pass. After ten clean passes, move to a new gate at a longer distance.
drills.coachingPoints: Inside of the foot, lock the ankle, pass to your partner's back foot.

drills.name: Rondo 4v1
drills.description: Four players keep the ball from one defender inside an 8x8 grid. The defender who wins the ball swaps in for the passer who lost it.
drills.coachingPoints: Open your body before the ball arrives so you already know your next pass.

drills.name: First Touch Box
drills.description: Partner drives balls in on the ground and in the air. Receiver takes a directional first touch out of a two-yard cone box and passes back. Ten reps, then switch.
drills.coachingPoints: Cushion the ball and push your first touch out of your feet, not underneath you.

drills.name: Switch the Field
drills.description: Two cone grids 30 yards apart. Each team connects three short passes in its grid, then drives a long ball to the far grid and the passer follows their pass.
drills.coachingPoints: Strike through the bottom half of the ball and get your head up before you switch.

drills.name: Finishing Circuit
drills.description: Three lines outside the box: lay-off and shoot, dribble and shoot, run onto a cross and finish. Shoot, retrieve your ball, rotate to the next line.
drills.coachingPoints: Pick your corner before the ball arrives, then hit it low and hard.

drills.name: Turn and Shoot
drills.description: Player checks to the top of the box with back to goal, receives from the line, turns over either shoulder, and shoots within two touches.
drills.coachingPoints: Check your shoulder before the pass comes so the turn is already decided.

drills.name: Volley Toss Finish
drills.description: Partner underhand-tosses from ten yards; shooter finishes first-time with laces or a side volley into the goal. Five reps each side, then switch roles.
drills.coachingPoints: Toe down, knee over the ball, short punch of a swing.

drills.name: 1v1 to Goal
drills.description: Attacker starts at midfield cone, defender closes from the goal line; attacker tries to beat the defender and finish past the keeper. Loser of the duel plays defense next rep.
drills.coachingPoints: Attack the defender's front foot at speed and shoot before they can recover.

drills.name: Dribble Maze
drills.description: Cones scattered across a 20x20 grid; every player dribbles freely, avoiding cones and other players. On the whistle, change speed or direction on command.
drills.coachingPoints: Small touches, eyes up between every touch.

drills.name: Move of the Day
drills.description: Teach one move (scissors, Cruyff, or stepover) at a cone. Players dribble in, execute the move at the cone, and accelerate away. Repeat with both feet.
drills.coachingPoints: Sell the fake with your whole body, then explode out of the move.

drills.name: Sprint Dribble Relay
drills.description: Teams line up behind a cone; first player speed-dribbles 25 yards around a far cone and back, then tags the next dribbler. First team to finish wins.
drills.coachingPoints: Push the ball ahead with your laces and run onto it. Don't tap and wait.

drills.name: Shield and Steal
drills.description: One ball per pair inside a small circle. Possessor shields for 30 seconds while the partner tries to poke it away, then switch roles.
drills.coachingPoints: Ball on your far foot, arm bar for balance, keep your body between defender and ball.

drills.name: Defend the Gate
drills.description: Attacker tries to dribble through a five-yard cone gate; defender jockeys and tackles when the ball is exposed. Three reps, then swap roles.
drills.coachingPoints: Low and sideways-on, patient feet. Tackle only when the touch is heavy.

drills.name: Press the Back Pass
drills.description: 5v5 possession in a grid. Any backward pass is the trigger: the two nearest defenders sprint to press the receiver while the rest cut passing lanes.
drills.coachingPoints: Sprint the first five yards, then slow down and curve your run to cut off one side.

drills.name: Keeper Handling Warmup
drills.description: Partner serves rolled balls, waist-high balls, and chest-high balls from ten yards. Keeper works scoop, basket catch, and W-catch, ten of each.
drills.coachingPoints: Get your body behind the ball first. Hands are the backup, not the plan.

drills.name: Keeper Arc and Set
drills.description: Keeper shuffles along a cone arc between the posts, sets on the server's touch, and saves a shot placed to either side. Six shots, rotate keepers.
drills.coachingPoints: Feet set before the shot. You can't dive while you're still moving.

drills.name: Shadow Back Four
drills.description: A line of four defenders slides, drops, and steps together as the coach walks a ball across the field. No opponents. Pure shape and spacing.
drills.coachingPoints: Move the moment the ball moves; stay connected to the player beside you.

drills.name: 3v3 to Small Goals
drills.description: Two simultaneous 3v3 games on 25x20 fields with small cone goals, no keepers. Three-minute games, losers rotate off if numbers allow.
drills.coachingPoints: First look forward. Score fast before the defense is set.

drills.name: Transition 3v2 Waves
drills.description: Three attackers go against two defenders toward goal. The instant the ball is lost or scored, the defenders outlet to a new ball and attack the other way with a teammate joining.
drills.coachingPoints: Attack immediately after winning it. The first five seconds are the advantage.

drills.name: Give-and-Go Gauntlet
drills.description: Dribbler plays a wall pass with a stationary partner at each of three cones down the field, sprinting onto each return, and finishes with a shot. Switch roles each run.
drills.coachingPoints: Pass and immediately sprint into the space behind. The pass is the start of your run.
